entry.title: New: RES24-164 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF UP TO $3,200 TO THE CITY FROM THE AGA (FORMERLY KNOWN AS THE ASSOCIATION OF GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTANTS) FOR CONFERENCE REGISTRATION AND LODGING FOR EMPLOYEES FROM THE OFFICE OF THE CITY AUDITOR TO ATTEND THE 2024 PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT TRAINING.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
